title: Living in Boulder Vlog 6 - 30 - 2017: Buildings of Rome Book. Platner and Ashby.

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night vlog update covering his daily routine: visiting his mom's house to do chores, a bike ride along the river to the farmer's market area with his girlfriend Kirsten Rain, and ongoing work on a personal 'Buildings of Rome' book project where he is cataloguing and mapping ancient Roman houses by region on Google Earth. He also mentions wanting to get in shape and watching the show 'Bored' with Kirsten.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Deeply engaged; finds the Republican-era city with houses on the hills more interesting than later periods
Excited about the project and sees it as genuinely cool and worthwhile
Apologetic about posting less; prefers putting out meaningful content over filler
Feels he badly needs it and is considering committing to it

entities: Buildings of Rome (Platner and Ashby book)
